findings.title: P3-1
findings.detail: New validator block calls getWeightedSubphaseBoundary/findWeightedSubphase for RP00.P02.M07.S12 (asserts sourceMicroPhaseId=RP00.P02.M07, terminal=false, next=S13). The diff does not add a weighted-ledger entry for S12, so it must already be pre-populated. Confirm via `npm run rp00:control-plane:validate`.

findings.title: P3-2
findings.detail: closeout_state_policy + construction_inspection reference closeout_pack_ref CP00-040 / evidence_root docs/closeout-packs/cp00-040. Diff does not include those evidence files; confirm the evidence root exists on disk (validator may assert existence).

findings.title: P3-3
findings.detail: Added subphase_closeouts entry for S12 has no inline construction_inspection, yet the closeout loop checks `inspection.control_plane_test_and_golden_case_set_persistence_boundary_verified === true`. This matches the existing S11 entry shape (which passed), so `inspection` is sourced outside the inline entry. Not a regression; confirm the verified flag resolves true in the validation run.

findings.title: P3-4
findings.detail: Tests/policy reference createTestAndGoldenCaseSetLockAcquisitionRuleResult(), CONTROL_PLANE_TEST_AND_GOLDEN_CASE_SET_CONTEXT_IDS, and CONTROL_PLANE_TEST_AND_GOLDEN_CASE_SET_SERVICE_ENTRYPOINT_CONTRACT, all defined in prior S11 work, not this diff. Almost certainly present (S11 is closed); the test suite would fail loudly otherwise.
